name: Ultra HD Smart TV 55"
description: Experience breathtaking visuals with this 55-inch 4K Ultra HD Smart TV. Features HDR10+, Dolby Atmos, built-in streaming apps, and a sleek bezel-less design.

name: LED Smart TV 43"
description: Compact yet powerful 43-inch LED Smart TV with vibrant colors, Wi-Fi connectivity, and access to all major streaming platforms.

name: OLED TV 65" Premium
description: The pinnacle of display technology. 65-inch OLED with perfect blacks, infinite contrast ratio, and cinema-grade color accuracy.

name: Soundbar Pro 2.1
description: Immersive 2.1 channel soundbar with wireless subwoofer. Bluetooth 5.0, HDMI ARC, and crystal-clear dialogue enhancement.

name: Universal TV Mount
description: Heavy-duty tilting wall mount compatible with 32-70 inch TVs. Easy installation with all hardware included.

name: Streaming Media Player
description: Turn any TV into a smart TV. 4K streaming, voice control, and access to thousands of apps and channels.

name: Premium L-Shape Sofa
description: Luxurious L-shaped sofa with high-density foam cushions, premium fabric upholstery, and sturdy hardwood frame. Seats 5-6 comfortably.

name: 3-Seater Velvet Sofa
description: Elegant 3-seater sofa in rich velvet fabric. Features pillow-back design, tapered wooden legs, and removable cushion covers.

name: Executive Office Bureau
description: Sophisticated office bureau with 5 drawers, cable management system, and genuine wood veneer finish. Perfect for home offices.

name: Classic Writing Bureau
description: Traditional writing bureau with drop-down desk, multiple compartments, and antique brass hardware. Adds elegance to any room.

name: Modern Wardrobe Cupboard
description: Spacious 3-door wardrobe with mirror panel, adjustable shelves, hanging rail, and soft-close hinges. Available in walnut finish.

name: Kitchen Storage Cupboard
description: Multi-purpose kitchen cupboard with 4 shelves, 2 drawers, and moisture-resistant laminate finish. Maximizes kitchen storage.

name: Solid Wood Panel Door
description: Premium solid wood panel door with rich grain texture. Pre-finished with weather-resistant sealant. Standard size 80x36 inches.

name: Modern Flush Door
description: Sleek flush door with smooth laminate finish. Lightweight yet durable construction. Ideal for interior use.

name: UPVC Sliding Window
description: Energy-efficient UPVC sliding window with double glazing, multi-point locking system, and weather seals. Size: 4x4 feet.

name: French Window Set
description: Elegant French window set with tempered glass panels, decorative grilles, and smooth opening mechanism. Brings natural light indoors.

name: Premium Floor Cleaner
description: Professional-grade floor cleaning liquid with long-lasting fragrance. Effective on marble, tiles, and wooden floors. 1 Liter bottle.

name: Multi-Surface Cleaning Spray
description: All-purpose cleaning spray for glass, countertops, appliances, and more. Streak-free shine with antibacterial formula. 500ml.

name: Antibacterial Hand Soap
description: Gentle yet effective liquid hand soap with moisturizing formula. Kills 99.9% germs while keeping hands soft. Available in lavender scent.

name: Dish Wash Soap Bar
description: Extra-strength dish washing soap bar that cuts through grease effortlessly. Long-lasting and gentle on hands. Pack of 3.

name: Furniture Polish Oil
description: Premium furniture polish oil that restores wood's natural shine. Protects against scratches and UV damage. Pleasant cedarwood scent.

name: Multi-Purpose Cleaning Oil
description: Versatile cleaning oil for stainless steel, leather, and wood surfaces. Removes stains and adds protective coating. 500ml bottle.
